prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 84 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 75–84 名区间；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现明显信号，声誉平稳、关注度一般，未见负面舆情或断档记录；电气工程 A、动力工程及工程热物理 A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与该校招生专业（电气工程及其自动化、能源与动力工程等）高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化 2024 年专业热度为高热推荐，持续升温；电子信息/通信为高热推荐；计算机类为推荐。本省 2026 年考生总数约 29.9 万，按近年物理类占比约 69.7% 估算，物理类考生约 20.84 万，较 2025 年（20.72 万）微增约 1200 人；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省院校；在贵州招生占比约 1.5%，属跨省招生，无本地偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年扩招约 20.6% 对位次的推后作用、电气等王牌专业热度持续升温对报考的拉动、以及本省物理类考生微增带来的竞争加剧，预计 2026 年最低位次，预测最低位次约 19861 名，区间 19361–20361 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11654→8829→11443→11690→17856, with a significant drop of about 6166 places in 2025 compared to 2024; cumulative drop of about 6166 places over the past 2 years, with a baseline of about 17856 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was about 89–91 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 102 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 123 students, an expansion of about 20.6% compared to 2025, which will alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), stable in the 75–84 range in recent years; no significant signals in reputation sentiment, Douyin popularity, or admission anomaly files, with stable reputation and average attention, no negative public opinion or record of gaps; Electrical Engineering rated A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-, both core disciplines in the power industry, highly corresponding to the school's enrollment majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.), strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was a high-heat recommendation in 2024, continuing to warm up; Electronics/Communications is a high-heat recommendation; Computer Science is recommended. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 208,400 based on the recent proportion of about 69.7%, a slight increase of about 1,200 compared to 2025 (207,200); the school is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not a provincial institution; its enrollment share in Guizhou is about 1.5%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in rankings in 2025, the expansion of about 20.6% in 2026 pushing rankings further back, the continued warming of popular majors like Electrical Engineering driving applications, and the slight increase in Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 19,861, with a range of 19,361–20,361.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 84th in the Soft Science main ranking (2026), classified as a science and engineering institution, with liberal arts majors not being its strength; the university shows no significant signals in reputation sentiment, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files, with stable reputation and average attention; its A-level disciplines are all engineering (Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-), with no direct correspondence to liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Public Administration, Social Work, Foreign Languages and Literature), and liberal arts majors lack strong disciplinary support.
